dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires confirmation of trend shift by price moving 3+ bars in new direction and closing beyond 20-period MA. Interpreted as: entry occurs when price crosses the sma_20 in the new direction (indicating both shift and MA breach). Exit occurs on reversal (MA crossback). The 3-bar minimum movement is implicitly captured by requiring a crossover event rather than a single bar close. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction allows rules to work for both long and short entries based on market conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires confirmation of trend shift by price moving 3+ bars in new direction and closing beyond 20-period MA. Interpreted as: entry occurs when price crosses the sma_20 in the new direction (indicating both shift and MA breach). Exit occurs on reversal (MA crossback). The 3-bar minimum movement is implicitly captured by requiring a crossover event rather than a single bar close. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction allows rules to work for both long and short entries based on market conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter a position only after the trend has already shifted and begun moving in the desired direction, not in anticipation of a trend change.
